narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 좁은 소나무 길에서 호랑이 꼬리가 질문처럼 한 번 움직였어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: On a narrow pine path, with the moon high, the tiger's tail moved once, like a question. "Are there more?" asked the child.

candidates.text: On a narrow pine path, with the moon high, the tiger's tail moved once, like a question. "Are there more?" asked the child.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 좁은 소나무 길에서 호랑이 꼬리가 질문처럼 한 번 움직였어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 솔뿌리와 시냇물 사이에서 호랑이는 폭풍 뒤 낮은 둥지를 보여 주었어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Among pine roots and streams, first, the tiger showed where birds nested low after a storm. "Only the fallen ones," the child answered.

candidates.text: Among pine roots and streams, first, the tiger showed where birds nested low after a storm. "Only the fallen ones," the child answered.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 솔뿌리와 시냇물 사이에서 호랑이는 폭풍 뒤 낮은 둥지를 보여 주었어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 솔뿌리와 시냇물 사이에서 그는 샘물에서 부러진 가지를 밀어냈어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Among pine roots and streams, next, he nudged a broken branch away from the spring. "Do not muddy the spring," he said.

candidates.text: Among pine roots and streams, next, he nudged a broken branch away from the spring. "Do not muddy the spring," he said.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 솔뿌리와 시냇물 사이에서 아이는 용기가 조용한 손일 수도 있음을 배웠어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Among pine roots and streams, quietly, the child learned that courage could be quiet hands. "Clear water first," said the child.

candidates.text: Among pine roots and streams, quietly, the child learned that courage could be quiet hands. "Clear water first," said the child.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Among pine roots and streams, with the moon high, together they returned a fallen charm ribbon to the shrine stone. "Do not take the green cones," said the tiger.

candidates.text: Among pine roots and streams, with the moon high, together they returned a fallen charm ribbon to the shrine stone. "Do not take the green cones," said the tiger.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 메아리 치는 바위 곁에서 낯선 외침이 골짜기를 갈랐어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Near a cliff echo, first, a stranger's shout cracked across the valley. "Only warning," rumbled the tiger.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 메아리 치는 바위 곁에서 호랑이는 이빨을 보이지 않고 메아리가 멈출 만큼 크게 섰어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Near a cliff echo, next, the tiger did not bare his teeth; he stood tall enough for the echo to think twice. "Loud feet break small homes," the tiger said.

candidates.text: Near a cliff echo, next, the tiger did not bare his teeth; he stood tall enough for the echo to think twice. "Loud feet break small homes," the tiger said.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 메아리 치는 바위 곁에서 아이는 붉은 천을 흔들어 염소들을 물렸어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Near a cliff echo, quietly, the child waved a red scarf to send goats away from the loose stones. "This way!" called the child.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Near a cliff echo, with the moon high, rocks rattled down where no one stood because warning arrived in time. "No harm," Grandmother shouted from below.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 산신돌 앞에서 낯선 이는 두 손을 펴고 절했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At the shrine stone, first, the stranger bowed with both hands open. "Paths are borrowed," Grandmother answered.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 산신돌 앞에서 마을 사람들은 둥지를 건드리지 않고 길을 치웠어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At the shrine stone, next, villagers cleared the path and left the nests untouched. "Borrow gently," said the child.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At the shrine stone, quietly, Grandmother poured clean water beside the shrine stone. "Remember," the tiger's eyes seemed to say.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At the shrine stone, with the moon high, the tiger watched from shadow, majestic as dusk. "I walked as if I owned the path," the stranger said.

candidates.text: At the shrine stone, with the moon high, the tiger watched from shadow, majestic as dusk. "I walked as if I owned the path," the stranger said.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 금강산 해돋이에 아이는 떨어진 솔방울을 상이 아니라 기억으로 간직했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At sunrise on Geumgang Mountain, first, the child kept a fallen pine cone as a reminder, not a prize. "That is better," she smiled.

candidates.text: At sunrise on Geumgang Mountain, first, the child kept a fallen pine cone as a reminder, not a prize. "That is better," she smiled.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 금강산 해돋이에 아이는 떨어진 솔방울을 상이 아니라 기억으로 간직했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At sunrise on Geumgang Mountain, first, the child kept a fallen pine cone as a reminder, not a prize. "That is better," she smiled.

candidates.text: 금강산 해돋이에 아이는 떨어진 솔방울을 상이 아니라 기억으로 간직했어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 금강산 해돋이에 새벽빛이 바위에 줄무늬처럼 지나갔어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At sunrise on Geumgang Mountain, next, when dawn touched the cliffs, stripes of light crossed the stone. "Bow to the mountain," whispered the wind.

candidates.text: At sunrise on Geumgang Mountain, next, when dawn touched the cliffs, stripes of light crossed the stone. "Bow to the mountain," whispered the wind.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At sunrise on Geumgang Mountain, quietly, the tiger bowed once from a high ridge. "Did you make a friend?" Grandmother asked.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 금강산 해돋이에 산은 보이는 이웃과 보이지 않는 이웃으로 가득했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At sunrise on Geumgang Mountain, with the moon high, the mountain felt full of neighbors, seen and unseen. "I learned a neighbor," said the child.

candidates.text: At sunrise on Geumgang Mountain, with the moon high, the mountain felt full of neighbors, seen and unseen. "I learned a neighbor," said the child.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: On a village festival path, first, the old man tuned his small drum and touched the lump on his cheek without shame. "Sing the funny one!" children called.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 마을 잔치길에서 아이들은 윙크 같은 노래를 좋아했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: On a village festival path, next, children liked his songs because each note seemed to wink. "Funny, not mean," he reminded them.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 마을 잔치길에서 오래 보는 이웃에게 그는 절과 노래로 답했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: On a village festival path, quietly, some neighbors stared too long, but he answered with a bow and a verse. "Rain wants an audience too," he laughed.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: On a village festival path, with the moon high, rain clouds sent him toward a hollow tree for shelter. "My song fits my face," he said.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Inside the hollow tree clearing, first, dokkaebi stomped in with lantern mushrooms swinging from their belts. "It belongs to me," he answered gently.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 사계절 별빛 속에서 겨울 숨결은 가까워 보여도 손은 멀었어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Through four seasons of stars, with the moon high, winter made their breath look close while their hands stayed far. "I am waiting," she said in autumn.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 사계절 별빛 속에서 봄에는 직녀가 비를 위한 초록 구름단을 짰어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Through four seasons of stars, before dawn, spring found Jiknyeo weaving green cloud hems for rain. "I remember," he said in winter.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 칠석 밤에 까치가 먼저 오르고 까마귀가 날개를 맞댔어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: On Chilseok night, first, magpies flew up first, then crows, wing beside wing. "I have waited all year," he said.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 칠석 밤에 새들의 등이 별빛으로 수놓은 검은 다리가 되었어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: On Chilseok night, next, their backs made a dark bridge stitched with starlight. "Then walk gently," Jiknyeo answered.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: On Chilseok night, quietly, Jiknyeo stepped onto the bridge as if stepping onto a held breath. "Gently," he promised.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: On Chilseok night, with the moon high, Gyeonwu bowed to every bird before reaching for her hand. "Do not hurry," the magpies cried.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At dawn after Chilseok, first, they spoke until the last star paled behind the river. "Until next year," she said.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At dawn after Chilseok, next, when the birds shook out their tired wings, the bridge became sky again. "Across the stars," he answered.

candidates.text: In the lotus pond at dawn, before dawn, two lotus flowers opened where the sisters had once whispered. "Tell me the truth," someone said.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 홍련와 연꽃가 있는 옛이야기 길에서 홍련와 연꽃가 조용히 마주 보며 다음 선택을 생각했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: In the lotus pond at dawn, before dawn, two lotus flowers opened where the sisters had once whispered. "Tell me the truth," someone said.

candidates.text: 홍련와 연꽃가 있는 옛이야기 길에서 홍련와 연꽃가 조용히 마주 보며 다음 선택을 생각했어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 홍련와 연꽃가 있는 옛이야기 길에서 진실 곁에서 오래된 약속과 마음의 무게가 드러났어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: In the lotus pond at dawn, after a pause, the household changed its rules so children would be believed sooner. "I will answer carefully," came the reply.

candidates.text: In the lotus pond at dawn, after a pause, the household changed its rules so children would be believed sooner. "I will answer carefully," came the reply.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 홍련와 연꽃가 있는 옛이야기 길에서 진실 곁에서 오래된 약속과 마음의 무게가 드러났어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: In the lotus pond at dawn, after a pause, the household changed its rules so children would be believed sooner. "I will answer carefully," came the reply.

candidates.text: 홍련와 연꽃가 있는 옛이야기 길에서 진실 곁에서 오래된 약속과 마음의 무게가 드러났어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 깊은 산 샘가에서 나무꾼은 사냥꾼에게 쫓기던 사슴을 숨겨 주었어요. 솔바람이 지나가자 사슴은 고개를 숙였지요. “은혜를 잊지 않겠습니다.”
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Deep in the mountain, a woodcutter hid a frightened deer from hunters. Pine wind brushed the spring, and the deer bowed low. "I will remember your kindness," it whispered.

candidates.text: Deep in the mountain, a woodcutter hid a frightened deer from hunters. Pine wind brushed the spring, and the deer bowed low. "I will remember your kindness," it whispered.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 깊은 산 샘가에서 나무꾼은 사냥꾼에게 쫓기던 사슴을 숨겨 주었어요. 솔바람이 지나가자 사슴은 고개를 숙였지요. “은혜를 잊지 않겠습니다.”
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Deep in the mountain, a woodcutter hid a frightened deer from hunters. Pine wind brushed the spring, and the deer bowed low. "I will remember your kindness," it whispered.

candidates.text: 깊은 산 샘가에서 나무꾼은 사냥꾼에게 쫓기던 사슴을 숨겨 주었어요. 솔바람이 지나가자 사슴은 고개를 숙였지요. “은혜를 잊지 않겠습니다.”

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 사슴은 선녀들이 내려와 목욕하는 숨은 못을 알려 주었어요. “날개옷 하나를 감추면 그 주인은 하늘로 돌아가지 못합니다.” 그 말은 이상하게 무거웠어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The deer pointed to a hidden pool where sky fairies came to bathe. "If one wing robe is hidden, its owner cannot fly home," the deer said, and the words felt heavy.

candidates.text: The deer pointed to a hidden pool where sky fairies came to bathe. "If one wing robe is hidden, its owner cannot fly home," the deer said, and the words felt heavy.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 사슴은 선녀들이 내려와 목욕하는 숨은 못을 알려 주었어요. “날개옷 하나를 감추면 그 주인은 하늘로 돌아가지 못합니다.” 그 말은 이상하게 무거웠어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The deer pointed to a hidden pool where sky fairies came to bathe. "If one wing robe is hidden, its owner cannot fly home," the deer said, and the words felt heavy.

candidates.text: 사슴은 선녀들이 내려와 목욕하는 숨은 못을 알려 주었어요. “날개옷 하나를 감추면 그 주인은 하늘로 돌아가지 못합니다.” 그 말은 이상하게 무거웠어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 달이 오르자 흰 날개옷들이 바위 위에 구름처럼 놓였어요. 나무꾼은 손을 뻗어 하나를 솔가지 아래 감추었지만, 마음속으로는 잘못인 줄 알았어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: When the moon rose, white wing robes lay on a rock like folded clouds. The woodcutter reached out and hid one beneath pine branches, though his heart knew it was wrong.

candidates.text: When the moon rose, white wing robes lay on a rock like folded clouds. The woodcutter reached out and hid one beneath pine branches, though his heart knew it was wrong.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 달이 오르자 흰 날개옷들이 바위 위에 구름처럼 놓였어요. 나무꾼은 손을 뻗어 하나를 솔가지 아래 감추었지만, 마음속으로는 잘못인 줄 알았어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: When the moon rose, white wing robes lay on a rock like folded clouds. The woodcutter reached out and hid one beneath pine branches, though his heart knew it was wrong.

candidates.text: 달이 오르자 흰 날개옷들이 바위 위에 구름처럼 놓였어요. 나무꾼은 손을 뻗어 하나를 솔가지 아래 감추었지만, 마음속으로는 잘못인 줄 알았어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 막내 선녀는 자기 날개옷을 찾지 못했어요. 다른 선녀들은 별빛 쪽으로 올라갔지만, 막내 선녀만 차가운 물가에 두려운 얼굴로 남았지요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The youngest fairy could not find her robe. The others rose toward the stars, but she stayed by the cold water, scared and alone.

candidates.text: The youngest fairy could not find her robe. The others rose toward the stars, but she stayed by the cold water, scared and alone.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 막내 선녀는 자기 날개옷을 찾지 못했어요. 다른 선녀들은 별빛 쪽으로 올라갔지만, 막내 선녀만 차가운 물가에 두려운 얼굴로 남았지요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The youngest fairy could not find her robe. The others rose toward the stars, but she stayed by the cold water, scared and alone.

candidates.text: 막내 선녀는 자기 날개옷을 찾지 못했어요. 다른 선녀들은 별빛 쪽으로 올라갔지만, 막내 선녀만 차가운 물가에 두려운 얼굴로 남았지요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 나무꾼은 선녀를 오두막으로 데려가 따뜻한 밥과 마른 이불을 내주었어요. 선녀는 고맙다고 했지만, 밤마다 한지문 너머 하늘을 바라보았어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The woodcutter brought the fairy to his cottage and gave her warm rice and a dry blanket. She thanked him, but every night she looked up through the hanji door.

candidates.text: The woodcutter brought the fairy to his cottage and gave her warm rice and a dry blanket. She thanked him, but every night she looked up through the hanji door.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 나무꾼은 선녀를 오두막으로 데려가 따뜻한 밥과 마른 이불을 내주었어요. 선녀는 고맙다고 했지만, 밤마다 한지문 너머 하늘을 바라보았어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The woodcutter brought the fairy to his cottage and gave her warm rice and a dry blanket. She thanked him, but every night she looked up through the hanji door.

candidates.text: 나무꾼은 선녀를 오두막으로 데려가 따뜻한 밥과 마른 이불을 내주었어요. 선녀는 고맙다고 했지만, 밤마다 한지문 너머 하늘을 바라보았어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 그날 밤 사슴이 꿈에 나타나 말했어요. “아이 셋을 낳기 전에는 날개옷을 보이면 안 됩니다.” 그 말은 약속 같기도 하고 덫 같기도 했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The deer returned in a dream and warned him, "Do not show the wing robe until you have three children." The warning sounded like a promise and a trap.

candidates.text: The deer returned in a dream and warned him, "Do not show the wing robe until you have three children." The warning sounded like a promise and a trap.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 그날 밤 사슴이 꿈에 나타나 말했어요. “아이 셋을 낳기 전에는 날개옷을 보이면 안 됩니다.” 그 말은 약속 같기도 하고 덫 같기도 했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The deer returned in a dream and warned him, "Do not show the wing robe until you have three children." The warning sounded like a promise and a trap.

candidates.text: 그날 밤 사슴이 꿈에 나타나 말했어요. “아이 셋을 낳기 전에는 날개옷을 보이면 안 됩니다.” 그 말은 약속 같기도 하고 덫 같기도 했어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 계절이 지나 선녀는 마을길을 익혔고, 나무꾼은 선녀의 하늘 노래를 배웠어요. 그래도 그는 날개옷이 어디 숨었는지 말하지 않았지요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Seasons passed. The fairy learned the village paths, and the woodcutter learned her sky songs. Still, he never told her where the wing robe slept.

candidates.text: Seasons passed. The fairy learned the village paths, and the woodcutter learned her sky songs. Still, he never told her where the wing robe slept.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 계절이 지나 선녀는 마을길을 익혔고, 나무꾼은 선녀의 하늘 노래를 배웠어요. 그래도 그는 날개옷이 어디 숨었는지 말하지 않았지요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Seasons passed. The fairy learned the village paths, and the woodcutter learned her sky songs. Still, he never told her where the wing robe slept.

candidates.text: 계절이 지나 선녀는 마을길을 익혔고, 나무꾼은 선녀의 하늘 노래를 배웠어요. 그래도 그는 날개옷이 어디 숨었는지 말하지 않았지요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 비 오는 아침 첫아이가 태어났어요. 선녀는 지친 눈물 사이로 웃으며 별의 자장가를 불렀고, 나무꾼은 사슴의 경고를 떠올렸어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Their first child was born on a rainy morning. The fairy smiled through tired tears and sang a star lullaby, while the woodcutter remembered the deer's warning.

candidates.text: Their first child was born on a rainy morning. The fairy smiled through tired tears and sang a star lullaby, while the woodcutter remembered the deer's warning.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 비 오는 아침 첫아이가 태어났어요. 선녀는 지친 눈물 사이로 웃으며 별의 자장가를 불렀고, 나무꾼은 사슴의 경고를 떠올렸어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Their first child was born on a rainy morning. The fairy smiled through tired tears and sang a star lullaby, while the woodcutter remembered the deer's warning.

candidates.text: 비 오는 아침 첫아이가 태어났어요. 선녀는 지친 눈물 사이로 웃으며 별의 자장가를 불렀고, 나무꾼은 사슴의 경고를 떠올렸어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 아이는 자라 달그림자를 따라 방 안을 뛰었어요. 가끔 선녀가 “언니들이 꿈에 보여요” 하고 속삭이면, 방 안은 아주 조용해졌지요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The child grew, chasing moon shadows across the floor. Sometimes the fairy whispered, "I dream of my sisters," and the room became very still.

candidates.text: The child grew, chasing moon shadows across the floor. Sometimes the fairy whispered, "I dream of my sisters," and the room became very still.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 아이는 자라 달그림자를 따라 방 안을 뛰었어요. 가끔 선녀가 “언니들이 꿈에 보여요” 하고 속삭이면, 방 안은 아주 조용해졌지요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The child grew, chasing moon shadows across the floor. Sometimes the fairy whispered, "I dream of my sisters," and the room became very still.

candidates.text: 아이는 자라 달그림자를 따라 방 안을 뛰었어요. 가끔 선녀가 “언니들이 꿈에 보여요” 하고 속삭이면, 방 안은 아주 조용해졌지요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 배꽃이 깃털처럼 희게 피는 봄에 둘째 아이가 태어났어요. 집 안에는 작은 버선과 따뜻한 밥, 그리고 아직 숨은 진실이 가득했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: A second child arrived in spring, when pear blossoms opened white as feathers. The house was full of small socks, warm rice, and one hidden truth.

candidates.text: A second child arrived in spring, when pear blossoms opened white as feathers. The house was full of small socks, warm rice, and one hidden truth.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 배꽃이 깃털처럼 희게 피는 봄에 둘째 아이가 태어났어요. 집 안에는 작은 버선과 따뜻한 밥, 그리고 아직 숨은 진실이 가득했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: A second child arrived in spring, when pear blossoms opened white as feathers. The house was full of small socks, warm rice, and one hidden truth.

candidates.text: 배꽃이 깃털처럼 희게 피는 봄에 둘째 아이가 태어났어요. 집 안에는 작은 버선과 따뜻한 밥, 그리고 아직 숨은 진실이 가득했어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 어느 저녁 선녀가 물었어요. “왜 지붕을 보면 대답을 들을 것처럼 바라보나요?” 나무꾼의 숟가락이 밥 위에서 멈추었어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: One evening the fairy asked, "Why do you look at the roof as if it can answer you?" The woodcutter's spoon stopped above the rice.

candidates.text: One evening the fairy asked, "Why do you look at the roof as if it can answer you?" The woodcutter's spoon stopped above the rice.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 어느 저녁 선녀가 물었어요. “왜 지붕을 보면 대답을 들을 것처럼 바라보나요?” 나무꾼의 숟가락이 밥 위에서 멈추었어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: One evening the fairy asked, "Why do you look at the roof as if it can answer you?" The woodcutter's spoon stopped above the rice.

candidates.text: 어느 저녁 선녀가 물었어요. “왜 지붕을 보면 대답을 들을 것처럼 바라보나요?” 나무꾼의 숟가락이 밥 위에서 멈추었어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 그는 “내가 당신의 날개옷을 숨겼소. 미안하오”라고 말할 수도 있었어요. 하지만 또 하룻밤 비밀을 품었고, 등불은 더 흐려 보였어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: He could have said, "I hid your robe, and I am sorry." Instead he carried the secret through another night, and the lantern seemed dimmer.

candidates.text: He could have said, "I hid your robe, and I am sorry." Instead he carried the secret through another night, and the lantern seemed dimmer.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 그는 “내가 당신의 날개옷을 숨겼소. 미안하오”라고 말할 수도 있었어요. 하지만 또 하룻밤 비밀을 품었고, 등불은 더 흐려 보였어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: He could have said, "I hid your robe, and I am sorry." Instead he carried the secret through another night, and the lantern seemed dimmer.

candidates.text: 그는 “내가 당신의 날개옷을 숨겼소. 미안하오”라고 말할 수도 있었어요. 하지만 또 하룻밤 비밀을 품었고, 등불은 더 흐려 보였어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 셋째 아이가 태어나기 전에, 나무꾼은 흰 날개옷을 꺼내 내려놓았어요. “내가 이것을 숨겼소.” 그의 목소리가 떨렸어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Before the third child was born, the woodcutter pulled down the white wing robe. "I kept this from you," he said, and his voice shook.

candidates.text: Before the third child was born, the woodcutter pulled down the white wing robe. "I kept this from you," he said, and his voice shook.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 셋째 아이가 태어나기 전에, 나무꾼은 흰 날개옷을 꺼내 내려놓았어요. “내가 이것을 숨겼소.” 그의 목소리가 떨렸어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Before the third child was born, the woodcutter pulled down the white wing robe. "I kept this from you," he said, and his voice shook.

candidates.text: 셋째 아이가 태어나기 전에, 나무꾼은 흰 날개옷을 꺼내 내려놓았어요. “내가 이것을 숨겼소.” 그의 목소리가 떨렸어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 선녀는 날개옷을 가슴에 안았어요. “진실을 나에게 맡겨 주었어야 해요.” 선녀의 슬픔은 조용했지만 방 안을 가득 채웠어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The fairy held the robe to her heart. "You should have trusted me with the truth," she said. Her sadness was quiet, but it filled the whole room.

candidates.text: The fairy held the robe to her heart. "You should have trusted me with the truth," she said. Her sadness was quiet, but it filled the whole room.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 선녀는 날개옷을 가슴에 안았어요. “진실을 나에게 맡겨 주었어야 해요.” 선녀의 슬픔은 조용했지만 방 안을 가득 채웠어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The fairy held the robe to her heart. "You should have trusted me with the truth," she said. Her sadness was quiet, but it filled the whole room.

candidates.text: 선녀는 날개옷을 가슴에 안았어요. “진실을 나에게 맡겨 주었어야 해요.” 선녀의 슬픔은 조용했지만 방 안을 가득 채웠어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 날개옷은 다시 하얀 날개가 되었어요. 선녀는 한 아이씩 두 팔에 안았지요. “나는 하늘 집으로 돌아가야 해요.” 나무꾼은 웃지 못했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The robe became wings again. The fairy lifted one child in each arm. "I must go home," she said, and the woodcutter did not smile.

candidates.text: The robe became wings again. The fairy lifted one child in each arm. "I must go home," she said, and the woodcutter did not smile.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 날개옷은 다시 하얀 날개가 되었어요. 선녀는 한 아이씩 두 팔에 안았지요. “나는 하늘 집으로 돌아가야 해요.” 나무꾼은 웃지 못했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The robe became wings again. The fairy lifted one child in each arm. "I must go home," she said, and the woodcutter did not smile.

candidates.text: 날개옷은 다시 하얀 날개가 되었어요. 선녀는 한 아이씩 두 팔에 안았지요. “나는 하늘 집으로 돌아가야 해요.” 나무꾼은 웃지 못했어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 오두막은 갑자기 너무 조용해졌어요. 문가에는 작은 고무신만 남았고, 나무꾼은 정직하지 못한 사랑이 외로움이 될 수 있음을 깨달았어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The cottage was suddenly too quiet. Small sandals waited by the door, and the woodcutter finally understood that love without honesty can become loneliness.

candidates.text: The cottage was suddenly too quiet. Small sandals waited by the door, and the woodcutter finally understood that love without honesty can become loneliness.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 오두막은 갑자기 너무 조용해졌어요. 문가에는 작은 고무신만 남았고, 나무꾼은 정직하지 못한 사랑이 외로움이 될 수 있음을 깨달았어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The cottage was suddenly too quiet. Small sandals waited by the door, and the woodcutter finally understood that love without honesty can become loneliness.

candidates.text: 오두막은 갑자기 너무 조용해졌어요. 문가에는 작은 고무신만 남았고, 나무꾼은 정직하지 못한 사랑이 외로움이 될 수 있음을 깨달았어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 샘가에 다시 사슴이 나타났어요. “하늘에서 물 긷는 두레박이 내려옵니다. 그 안에 타거든 꼭 붙잡고 아래를 보지 마세요.”
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At the spring, the deer appeared again. "A sky bucket comes down for water," it said. "If you climb in, hold tight and do not look down."

candidates.text: At the spring, the deer appeared again. "A sky bucket comes down for water," it said. "If you climb in, hold tight and do not look down."

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 샘가에 다시 사슴이 나타났어요. “하늘에서 물 긷는 두레박이 내려옵니다. 그 안에 타거든 꼭 붙잡고 아래를 보지 마세요.”
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: At the spring, the deer appeared again. "A sky bucket comes down for water," it said. "If you climb in, hold tight and do not look down."

candidates.text: 샘가에 다시 사슴이 나타났어요. “하늘에서 물 긷는 두레박이 내려옵니다. 그 안에 타거든 꼭 붙잡고 아래를 보지 마세요.”

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 하늘 두레박이 은빛 물소리를 내며 샘에 내려왔어요. 나무꾼은 그 안에 올라타 젖은 줄을 꼭 잡았고, 산들은 아래에서 작아졌어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The sky bucket dipped into the spring with a silver splash. The woodcutter climbed inside, clutching the wet rope as mountains shrank below.

candidates.text: The sky bucket dipped into the spring with a silver splash. The woodcutter climbed inside, clutching the wet rope as mountains shrank below.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 하늘 두레박이 은빛 물소리를 내며 샘에 내려왔어요. 나무꾼은 그 안에 올라타 젖은 줄을 꼭 잡았고, 산들은 아래에서 작아졌어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The sky bucket dipped into the spring with a silver splash. The woodcutter climbed inside, clutching the wet rope as mountains shrank below.

candidates.text: 하늘 두레박이 은빛 물소리를 내며 샘에 내려왔어요. 나무꾼은 그 안에 올라타 젖은 줄을 꼭 잡았고, 산들은 아래에서 작아졌어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 하늘 마을의 달빛 문 곁에 선녀와 아이들이 서 있었어요. 나무꾼은 깊이 고개를 숙였어요. “미안합니다.”
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: In the sky village, the fairy stood with the children beside a moon-bright gate. The woodcutter bowed low. "I am sorry," he said.

candidates.text: In the sky village, the fairy stood with the children beside a moon-bright gate. The woodcutter bowed low. "I am sorry," he said.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 하늘 마을의 달빛 문 곁에 선녀와 아이들이 서 있었어요. 나무꾼은 깊이 고개를 숙였어요. “미안합니다.”
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: In the sky village, the fairy stood with the children beside a moon-bright gate. The woodcutter bowed low. "I am sorry," he said.

candidates.text: 하늘 마을의 달빛 문 곁에 선녀와 아이들이 서 있었어요. 나무꾼은 깊이 고개를 숙였어요. “미안합니다.”

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 선녀는 그가 머물도록 허락했고 아이들은 그의 손을 잡았어요. 어떤 저녁은 다정했지만, 그는 자신이 숨겼던 날개옷의 무게를 잊지 못했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The fairy let him stay, and the children held his hands. Some evenings were gentle, but he could still feel the weight of the robe he had hidden.

candidates.text: The fairy let him stay, and the children held his hands. Some evenings were gentle, but he could still feel the weight of the robe he had hidden.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 선녀는 그가 머물도록 허락했고 아이들은 그의 손을 잡았어요. 어떤 저녁은 다정했지만, 그는 자신이 숨겼던 날개옷의 무게를 잊지 못했어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The fairy let him stay, and the children held his hands. Some evenings were gentle, but he could still feel the weight of the robe he had hidden.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 얼마 지나지 않아 나무꾼은 땅에 계신 늙은 어머니가 그리워졌어요. “한 번만 뵙고 싶소.” 그 말에 선녀의 얼굴이 걱정스러워졌어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Soon the woodcutter missed his old mother on earth. "I want to see her once," he said. The fairy's face grew worried.

candidates.text: Soon the woodcutter missed his old mother on earth. "I want to see her once," he said. The fairy's face grew worried.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 얼마 지나지 않아 나무꾼은 땅에 계신 늙은 어머니가 그리워졌어요. “한 번만 뵙고 싶소.” 그 말에 선녀의 얼굴이 걱정스러워졌어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Soon the woodcutter missed his old mother on earth. "I want to see her once," he said. The fairy's face grew worried.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 선녀가 말했어요. “하늘말을 타고 다녀오세요. 하지만 절대로 발이 땅에 닿으면 안 됩니다.” 이미 한 번 경고가 깨졌기에 목소리는 부드럽고도 무거웠어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: "Ride the sky horse," the fairy told him, "but never let your feet touch the ground." Her voice was soft because warnings had already been broken once.

candidates.text: "Ride the sky horse," the fairy told him, "but never let your feet touch the ground." Her voice was soft because warnings had already been broken once.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 선녀가 말했어요. “하늘말을 타고 다녀오세요. 하지만 절대로 발이 땅에 닿으면 안 됩니다.” 이미 한 번 경고가 깨졌기에 목소리는 부드럽고도 무거웠어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: "Ride the sky horse," the fairy told him, "but never let your feet touch the ground." Her voice was soft because warnings had already been broken once.

candidates.text: 선녀가 말했어요. “하늘말을 타고 다녀오세요. 하지만 절대로 발이 땅에 닿으면 안 됩니다.” 이미 한 번 경고가 깨졌기에 목소리는 부드럽고도 무거웠어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 하늘말은 나무꾼을 어머니의 마당까지 데려다주었어요. 어머니는 기뻐 눈물을 흘리며 뜨거운 죽을 내놓았지요. “식기 전에 먹어라, 내 아들아.”
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The sky horse carried him to his mother's yard. She wept with joy and set out steaming porridge, saying, "Eat before it grows cold, my son."

candidates.text: The sky horse carried him to his mother's yard. She wept with joy and set out steaming porridge, saying, "Eat before it grows cold, my son."

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 하늘말은 나무꾼을 어머니의 마당까지 데려다주었어요. 어머니는 기뻐 눈물을 흘리며 뜨거운 죽을 내놓았지요. “식기 전에 먹어라, 내 아들아.”
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The sky horse carried him to his mother's yard. She wept with joy and set out steaming porridge, saying, "Eat before it grows cold, my son."

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 뜨거운 죽 한 방울이 하늘말에게 튀었어요. 말은 놀라 앞발을 들었고, 나무꾼은 미끄러졌어요. 숨 한 번 사이에 그의 발이 땅에 닿았지요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: A drop of hot porridge splashed the horse. It reared in pain, and the woodcutter slipped. For one breath, his foot touched earth.

candidates.text: A drop of hot porridge splashed the horse. It reared in pain, and the woodcutter slipped. For one breath, his foot touched earth.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 뜨거운 죽 한 방울이 하늘말에게 튀었어요. 말은 놀라 앞발을 들었고, 나무꾼은 미끄러졌어요. 숨 한 번 사이에 그의 발이 땅에 닿았지요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: A drop of hot porridge splashed the horse. It reared in pain, and the woodcutter slipped. For one breath, his foot touched earth.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 하늘말은 구름 속으로 다시 날아가 버렸어요. 나무꾼은 멀어지는 발굽 소리를 따라 달렸지만, 하늘길은 이미 닫혀 있었어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The horse flew back into the clouds. The woodcutter ran after the fading hoofbeats, but the sky road had closed.

candidates.text: The horse flew back into the clouds. The woodcutter ran after the fading hoofbeats, but the sky road had closed.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 하늘말은 구름 속으로 다시 날아가 버렸어요. 나무꾼은 멀어지는 발굽 소리를 따라 달렸지만, 하늘길은 이미 닫혀 있었어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 그는 몇 번이고 산속 샘으로 돌아갔어요. 물에는 구름이 비쳤지만 두레박은 내려오지 않았고, 바위 위에는 날개옷도 없었어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: He returned to the mountain spring again and again. The water reflected clouds, but no bucket came down, and no wing robe waited on the rock.

candidates.text: He returned to the mountain spring again and again. The water reflected clouds, but no bucket came down, and no wing robe waited on the rock.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 그는 몇 번이고 산속 샘으로 돌아갔어요. 물에는 구름이 비쳤지만 두레박은 내려오지 않았고, 바위 위에는 날개옷도 없었어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: He returned to the mountain spring again and again. The water reflected clouds, but no bucket came down, and no wing robe waited on the rock.

candidates.text: 그는 몇 번이고 산속 샘으로 돌아갔어요. 물에는 구름이 비쳤지만 두레박은 내려오지 않았고, 바위 위에는 날개옷도 없었어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 어떤 이야기꾼들은 그가 아침 하늘을 향해 우는 수탉이 되었다고 해요. “꼬끼오.” 그 울음은 기쁨이 아니라 그리움에서 나온 소리였어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Some tellers say he became the rooster who cries toward the morning sky. "Kkokkio," he called, not from joy, but from longing.

candidates.text: Some tellers say he became the rooster who cries toward the morning sky. "Kkokkio," he called, not from joy, but from longing.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 어떤 이야기꾼들은 그가 아침 하늘을 향해 우는 수탉이 되었다고 해요. “꼬끼오.” 그 울음은 기쁨이 아니라 그리움에서 나온 소리였어요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 높은 하늘에서 선녀는 수탉의 새벽 울음소리를 듣고 아이들을 꼭 안았어요. 선녀는 그를 비웃지 않았어요. 샘과 날개옷, 그리고 진실을 기억했지요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Far above, the fairy heard the rooster's dawn call and held the children close. She did not laugh at him. She remembered the spring, the robe, and the truth.

candidates.text: Far above, the fairy heard the rooster's dawn call and held the children close. She did not laugh at him. She remembered the spring, the robe, and the truth.

narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: Far above, the fairy heard the rooster's dawn call and held the children close. She did not laugh at him. She remembered the spring, the robe, and the truth.

candidates.text: 높은 하늘에서 선녀는 수탉의 새벽 울음소리를 듣고 아이들을 꼭 안았어요. 선녀는 그를 비웃지 않았어요. 샘과 날개옷, 그리고 진실을 기억했지요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 아이들은 사랑이 누군가의 것을 숨겨 붙잡는 일이 아니라는 것을 배웠어요. 사랑에는 말하기 어려운 진실도 필요하다는 것을요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The children learned that love is not keeping someone by hiding what belongs to them. Love needs truth, even when truth is hard to say.

candidates.text: The children learned that love is not keeping someone by hiding what belongs to them. Love needs truth, even when truth is hard to say.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 아이들은 사랑이 누군가의 것을 숨겨 붙잡는 일이 아니라는 것을 배웠어요. 사랑에는 말하기 어려운 진실도 필요하다는 것을요.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 그래서 아침 수탉이 울 때, 어떤 사람들은 그 소리에서 숨겨진 날개옷과 깨진 경고, 너무 늦게 배운 마음의 이야기를 들어요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: So when morning roosters call, some people hear more than noise. They hear a story about a hidden robe, a broken warning, and a heart learning too late.

candidates.text: So when morning roosters call, some people hear more than noise. They hear a story about a hidden robe, a broken warning, and a heart learning too late.

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 산속 샘은 오래도록 맑았어요. 그곳을 찾는 아이들은 이런 말을 들었지요. “빌린 날개는 돌려주고, 약속은 늦기 전에 지켜야 한단다.”
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: The mountain spring stayed clear. Children who visited it were told, "Borrowed wings must be returned, and promises must be kept while there is time."

candidates.text: The mountain spring stayed clear. Children who visited it were told, "Borrowed wings must be returned, and promises must be kept while there is time."

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 산속 샘은 오래도록 맑았어요. 그곳을 찾는 아이들은 이런 말을 들었지요. “빌린 날개는 돌려주고, 약속은 늦기 전에 지켜야 한단다.”

candidates.text: 산속 샘은 오래도록 맑았어요. 그곳을 찾는 아이들은 이런 말을 들었지요. “빌린 날개는 돌려주고, 약속은 늦기 전에 지켜야 한단다.”

narrationEntries.koreanNarrationText: 새벽 소리가 조금 슬프게 들린다면 귀 기울여 보세요. 이 옛이야기는 올라가거나 날아가는 장면을 마냥 기뻐하지 않아요. 더 일찍 정직하라고 알려 주는 이야기예요.
narrationEntries.englishNarrationText: And if the dawn sounds a little sad, listen carefully. The old tale is not cheering when he goes up or when she flies away; it is teaching us to be honest sooner.
